_note: Two IN-WINDOW seeds for the concurrent 2-ticker test (Aug-2024 -> Mar-2025 cold scan): GEO + MSTR, both driven by the SAME discrete catalyst (the Nov-5-2024 US election) but different theses (immigration/private-prisons vs crypto/BTC-leverage). Tests concurrent funding, independent exits, and whether the matcher correctly keeps them as TWO separate events. Look-ahead-clean: dated at true post-election publication, content reflects only what was public then (the surge + the crackdown/crypto-reserve expectation), NOT the later ~60% unwind. Hindsight seeding crutch, per README. Grounded in Fortune/Benzinga (GEO) + QZ/Stocktwits (MSTR) Nov-2024 coverage.

articles.title: Trump's win sends private-prison stocks soaring on deportation-crackdown bets
articles.snippet: GEO Group (GEO) vaulted ~42% the session after Trump's election win, with CoreCivic (CXW) up ~29%, as investors price a hard immigration crackdown that means big ICE-detention business for the private-prison operators. Still early - the enforcement build-out and detention-capacity expansion have not landed yet.

articles.title: MicroStrategy, the leveraged Bitcoin proxy, doubles as the Trump crypto rally powers Bitcoin higher
articles.snippet: MicroStrategy (MSTR) has jumped over 50% since the Nov-5 election, outpacing Bitcoin's ~30% rally, as Trump's 'crypto president' pledge - a strategic bitcoin reserve and eased regulation - lifts crypto. MSTR's debt-funded Bitcoin buying makes it the amplified, levered proxy on the move still building ahead.
